title: Voices from executives and teams I've served
intro: These are the words of colleagues, direct reports, and leaders who've trusted me with their most critical initiatives.

testimonials.text: Yoni is a powerhouse of a project manager — thorough, on top of things, organized, inclusive, and truly fantastic to work with. He is trustworthy and sees things through until the very end. His ability to move things forward was tremendous.
testimonials.name: Kristin Goto
testimonials.title: VP, Managing Director · AKQA

testimonials.text: Yoni managed to build the best communication and project management framework I have ever seen for our team — instrumental in helping engineers deliver on time. Any team would be lucky to have him.
testimonials.name: Andrey R.
testimonials.title: Sr. Data Engineer · BlueOwl, LLC

testimonials.text: Yoni is an excellent facilitator who communicates with empathy and has a rare ability to lead a divergent group through conflict and into alignment. He was an invaluable partner — a hybrid agile coach and process developer who helped us build our backlog and form working agreements.
testimonials.name: Eric Shamow
testimonials.title: Reliability and Engineering Leadership

testimonials.text: Yoni was by far the most effective Scrum Master I worked with in my career. He has a knack for knowing how to push the team in an effective way by understanding what inspires them and what processes don't work. I'd highly recommend Yoni.
testimonials.name: William Earls
testimonials.title: Senior Product Leader

testimonials.text: Yoni is incredibly reliable and skilled at brainstorming and leading teams. His ability to creatively guide discussions and bring people to meaningful conclusions is unmatched. I would work with him again in a heartbeat.
testimonials.name: Colton Weeks
testimonials.title: Growth Strategist

testimonials.text: Yoni is a strong technical project lead with skills in complex platform delivery and small project turnaround. His experience in project fundamentals, agile practices, and reliability in tough situations makes him invaluable.
testimonials.name: Andrew Dunbar
testimonials.title: MENA Lead · Infosys Experience
